body.title: Refractory period — habits suppress themselves for N cycles after firing
body.result: Already fully implemented. _refractory_map in basal_ganglia.py with IGOR_REFRACTORY_TTL_SEC (600s default) + IGOR_REFRACTORY_FACTOR (0.1). Winner marked refractory after select_habit(); score multiplied by 0.1 while in map. test_refractory.py has 8 tests. Directly addresses Igor's TWM noise observation.
body.description: D277 gap. Biological pattern: after a neuron fires, it enters a refractory period and cannot fire again immediately. Igor implementation: in basal_ganglia.py, maintain a _refractory_map = {habit_id: expiry_ts}. After a habit dispatches: add habit_id with TTL=10min. In _score_habit(): if habit_id in _refractory_map and not expired: multiply score by REFRACTORY_FACTOR (default 0.1). Effect: prevents channel flooding (PROC_FLAG_ANOMALY cannot spam every 30s), prevents PROC_BOREDOM_TRIGGER repeating the same wonder 3 turns in a row. Config: IGOR_REFRACTORY_TTL_SEC (default 600), IGOR_REFRACTORY_FACTOR (default 0.1). Files: cognition/basal_ganglia.py. Inertia: MEDIUM. Tests: verify score dampened within TTL, full score returned after TTL.
